name: Atlantico (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: purity, peace and the harmony of the people
the patriotism and the blood shed by the people for the freedom of the homeland

description: Three equal horizontal stripes of white, red, and white.
history: Adopted as the flag of the department of Atlantico, the colours echo those of the city of Barranquilla. Atlantico was created as a department in 1910.

features.symbolism: white for purity and the peace of the people; red for the patriotism and blood shed for liberty
